case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. THE BUNDOX RESTAURANT CORP.

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT THE BUNDOX RESTAURANT CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE BUNDOX RESTAURANT CORP. $116,621.82 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $116,621.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
